sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5794" key="a)mfi/doros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφίδορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n5794.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quite flayed,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.165</biblScope> </bibl> (Phalaec.)</sense> </entryFree>
